backfill_note: This run was executed on 2026-06-20; its raw artifacts were discarded per the finite-disk policy. run.sh + fixture/ are reconstructed from the run's recorded methodology so a third party can reproduce the method. results.json holds the numbers measured on 2026-06-20 — re-running today will drift (see below).

environment.note: Timing is machine- and network-dependent; the ratio (uv audit vs pip-audit) is the portable signal, not absolute seconds.

subject.name: uv
subject.install: GitHub release v0.11.23 (standalone zip), invoked as a separate binary (global uv left untouched)
subject.note: The 0.11.23 build is required for `uv audit --output-format sarif`; the then-global 0.11.14 lacked it.

data_source.name: OSV
data_source.drift_warning: Both tools query the live OSV database. Vulnerability COUNTS in results.json are as-of 2026-06-20 and will change as OSV adds/updates advisories. The fixture, commands, and speed ratio remain reproducible; exact counts are a point-in-time snapshot.

raw_artifacts.retention_policy: discarded at run time (finite local disk)
raw_artifacts.note: Downloaded uv binary + fixture venv were deleted after the run. No hashes were captured at the time (this predates the benchmarks repo). Reconstructed harness is committed instead; that is stated plainly rather than fabricating hashes.
